name: HAL Laboratory
description: Japanese developer closely associated with Nintendo, best known for Kirby, EarthBound support, and Super Smash Bros.

eras.title: Early Nintendo Collaboration
eras.description: Computer-game origins and early Nintendo support work.

eras.title: Kirby and Smash Era
eras.description: Kirby becomes HAL's defining franchise, followed by the original Smash Bros. games.

eras.title: Modern Kirby Era
eras.description: Continued Kirby development and Nintendo-exclusive identity.

notes: Modeled as a Nintendo child in this taxonomy because it is primarily useful as a Nintendo-associated studio page.
